hero.headline: The complete platform for your entire job search.
hero.subtext: JobApplica is not just a tracker. It discovers jobs for you, helps you apply with AI-generated CVs and cover letters, tracks your pipeline, monitors your inbox for replies, and follows up on your behalf.
hero.note: Free tier available. No credit card required.

problem.headline: Job searching is a full-time job. It should not be.
problem.body: Most people manage their job search across multiple browser tabs, a half-updated spreadsheet, and a vague memory of what they applied to three weeks ago. The process is broken, not you.

cards.title: Finding the right jobs
cards.desc: Endlessly scrolling job boards, missing relevant roles, and applying to positions that never fit your profile.

cards.title: Tailoring every application
cards.desc: Rewriting your CV and cover letter for each role from scratch, a process that can take hours per application.

cards.title: No record of what happened
cards.desc: No clear view of who responded, who went silent, or which applications have been waiting so long they need a follow-up.

cards.title: Missed follow-ups
cards.desc: Forgetting to follow up after an interview, or not knowing which stale applications are still worth pursuing.

features.headline: End to end. Not just tracking.
features.subtext: Every stage of your job search, from discovering the right roles to signing the offer, in one platform.

items.label: AI
items.title: Job Discovery
items.desc: Set up your profile once. JobApplica scans job boards, aggregates new listings, and surfaces roles that match your experience, delivered to you daily.
bullets: Profile-based job recommendations
Aggregated from multiple job boards
Daily digest of new matching roles
Smart filters by location, salary, work model

items.label: IMPORT
items.title: Smart Import
items.desc: Connect LinkedIn or your email and JobApplica automatically imports jobs you have saved, applied to, or received responses about. No manual entry needed.
bullets: Import saved jobs from LinkedIn
Auto-detect job emails in Gmail
Sync application history from your inbox
One-click browser extension for any job board

items.label: CV
items.title: AI Applications
items.desc: Paste a job description. Get a tailored CV and cover letter in seconds, matched to the role and optimised for ATS screening systems.
bullets: Tailored to each specific job description
ATS-optimised formatting and keywords
Cover letter matched to your tone
Editable drafts you own and control

items.label: ATS
items.title: Score Match
items.desc: Before you apply, see how well your CV matches the job description. Identify missing keywords and close gaps before the recruiter's system filters you out.
bullets: Keyword match score against the job description
Gap analysis with improvement suggestions
Skills and qualification comparison
Instant re-score after edits

items.label: BOARD
items.title: Visual Pipeline
items.desc: Track every application on a Kanban board. Drag cards through stages, add notes, and see your entire search at a glance. Free tier includes up to 50 applications.
bullets: Multiple boards for different search tracks
Custom stages: rename, add, reorder
Rich job details: salary, skills, notes
Board and list view

items.label: EMAIL
items.title: Email Intelligence
items.desc: Connect your inbox and JobApplica reads it for you. It auto-detects interview invites, rejections, and stale threads that need a follow-up message.
bullets: Auto-detect rejections and interview invites
Flag applications with no reply in 14+ days
Suggested follow-up email drafts
Never miss an important reply again

howItWorks.headline: From zero to offer, in one workflow.
howItWorks.subtext: JobApplica handles every stage of the job search. Here is the full picture.

steps.heading: Jobs come to you
steps.body: Complete your profile once: your skills, experience, location, preferred role, and salary range. JobApplica scans job boards daily and surfaces the most relevant matches. You can also connect LinkedIn or Gmail to import jobs and applications you have already started.

steps.heading: Tailor every application in minutes
steps.body: Open any job listing. JobApplica shows your ATS match score against the job description, highlights missing keywords, and generates a tailored CV and cover letter matched to that specific role. Edit, approve, and apply. No more starting from scratch.

steps.heading: Your pipeline, always up to date
steps.body: Every application, whether saved manually, imported from LinkedIn, or applied through JobApplica, lands on your Kanban board. Drag cards through stages as things progress. Add interview notes, salary details, and contact information. Your search, in one place.

steps.heading: Never let a lead go cold
steps.body: Connect your inbox and JobApplica monitors it for you. It auto-detects interview invites and rejections, flags applications that have gone silent, and drafts follow-up messages for threads that deserve attention. Stay on top of every active application, without the manual effort.

analytics.headline: Know exactly where you stand.
analytics.body: The analytics dashboard answers the questions every job seeker has but rarely tracks: response rate, ghosted applications, interview conversion, and pipeline velocity.
bullets: Response rate and interview conversion rate
Ghosted applications (14 or more days without reply)
Weekly application activity chart
Stage funnel with drop-off percentages
Top companies and source platform breakdown

preview.note: Sample data. Your dashboard updates live as you track applications.

extension.headline: Save any job in one click.
extension.body: Browse job boards yourself and save anything interesting. The extension reads the page and adds it to your board, capturing the title, company, salary, and description automatically.

steps.heading: Sign in to your JobApplica account
steps.sub: Your board is ready the moment you sign in.

steps.heading: Browse jobs and click Save
steps.sub: The extension reads the page. You never have to type anything.

pricing.headline: Start free. Scale when you need to.
pricing.subtext: Job tracking is free for smaller searches. Unlock AI features when you are ready to search smarter.

plans.name: Free
plans.desc: Track applications manually and get a feel for the platform.

plans.name: Pro
plans.desc: For active job seekers who want AI handling the heavy lifting.
features: AI CV and cover letter generator
ATS score match and gap analysis
Smart import from LinkedIn and Gmail

pricing.note: Prices in USD. Cancel or change plans anytime. Annual billing available.

finalCta.headline: Your next role is out there. Start with a system.
finalCta.body: Set up your profile, let AI find the right jobs, tailor your applications in minutes, and track everything in one place from first contact to final offer.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seoDesc: JobApplica privacy policy. Learn what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect your job search information.
privacy.tldr: We collect only what is needed to run JobApplica. We do not sell your data. We do not share your job search information with employers or recruiters. Your data is yours.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.seoDesc: JobApplica terms of service. Read the terms and conditions for using the JobApplica job search platform.
terms.tldr: By using JobApplica, you agree to these terms. They are written to be readable, not lawyerly. If something is unclear, email us.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.body: The link you followed may be broken, or the page may have been removed. Your job search does not have to stop here.
